headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Teledyne Technologies (TDY) After Its Strong 1 Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Teledyne Technologies at around US$635 per share still offers value, the key is to look past the headline price and focus on what you are actually paying for the underlying business. The stock has been relatively steady in the short term, with a 1.5% decline over the last 7 days and a 0.3% return over 30 days, while returns of 22.6% year to date and 37.6% over 1 year put recent moves into a longer context. Recent coverage has focused on Teledyne's position within...

headline: 1 Momentum  Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Ignore
summary: The stocks in this article are all trading near their 52-week highs. This strength often reflects positive developments such as new product launches, favorable industry trends, or improved financial performance.
